[1:a]aloop=loop=-1:size=2147483647,volume=-19dB,afade=t=in:st=0:d=0.5:curve=tri[r0];[0:a][r0]amix=inputs=2:duration=first:normalize=0[mixed];[mixed]loudnorm=I=-14:LRA=11:TP=-1.5:measured_I=-23.0:measured_LRA=10.5:measured_TP=-2.1:measured_thresh=-33.0:offset=0.5:linear=true:print_format=summary[aout]
